# John Menerick — Distinguished Security Engineer

> John Menerick is a Distinguished Information Security Engineer based in Castro Valley,
> California. He specializes in AI/ML security, zero-trust architecture, confidential
> computing, and detection & response systems. This site is his professional CV, research
> portfolio, and technical blog (Menerick's CyberForge).

## Professional Profile

- [About John Menerick](https://cv.securesql.info/): Overview of specializations, philosophy,
  and current research focus including tamper-evident Zero-Trust workloads and AI/ML infosec.

## Technical Research & Projects

- [Security Vulnerability Portfolio](https://cv.securesql.info/projects/): 24+ documented
  vulnerability discoveries spanning Apache Jetty/SOLR, Google Translate, Wikipedia XSS,
  Cloud9 XSS/RCE, jQuery XSS, CNN XSS, and multiple botnet analyses.
- [R&D and Community Contributions](https://cv.securesql.info/research/): Research spanning
  Kubernetes security, DARPA Cyber Grand Challenge (Team Shellphish), DARPA AIxCC,
  MISP threat intelligence, and startup security architecture.

## Technical Blog

- [Menerick's CyberForge Blog](https://cv.securesql.info/blog/): Critical analysis series
  on AI/ML limitations in cybersecurity.
- [Part 1 — The Cyber AI Hustle](https://cv.securesql.info/blog/snake-oil1/)
- [Part 2 — The Probability Problem](https://cv.securesql.info/blog/snake-oil2/)

## Credentials & Education

- CISSP (ISC²), Oracle OCI Foundations/Data/AI, FEMA ICS (IS-100/200/700/800),
  FCC General Class (W8MEJ)
- Michigan Technological University — B.S. Computer Science, B.S. Computer Systems
  Science, B.S. Business Systems and Finance

## External Profiles

- [GitHub (w8mej)](https://github.com/w8mej)
- [Keyoxide Identity](https://keyoxide.org/sephiroth@haxx.ninja)
